texto: Why should she have to feel unsafe? Didn't this world belong to her as much as it belonged to any man? Yes it did. McKenna refused to let them make her feel unsafe, either by cornering her, or by making her feel like she needed one to protect her
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Marina Gessner: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de temas ligados a reflexao. O trecho “Why should she have to feel unsafe? Didn't this world belong to her as much as it belonged to any…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, feminism, the-distance-from-me-to-you pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de the-distance-from-me-to-you.
